zh.Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾布臣,第一代特威茲穆爾男爵
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Comyn II於1242年出生在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾巴登時，他的父親Sir John I - Ruadh - The Red Comyn Earl of Badenoch - Justiciar of Galloway27歲，母親Marion Maclachlan Of Galloway16歲。他於大約1273年與Alianora de Balliol在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1302年5月26日之前在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾。

zh-hans.Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland: 苏格兰阿爾迪史爾布臣,第一代特威茲穆爾男爵
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Comyn II于1242年出生在苏格兰音巴內-爾巴登时，他的父亲Sir John I - Ruadh - The Red Comyn Earl of Badenoch - Justiciar of Galloway27岁，母亲Marion Maclachlan Of Galloway16岁。他于大约1273年与Alianora de Balliol在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1302年5月26日之前在苏格兰音巴內-爾。

nameMeanings.name: Comyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Cumming
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): most probably a habitational name from Bosc-Benard-Commin in Eure, France. This place lies on the edge of the Forêt de Rouvray, near Rouen, in the heart of the district from which came numerous Domesday barons, and so is much more likely to be the source of the name than Comines in Nord. The name is also possibly derived from the personal name Cumin, which is found in Norfolk, Lincolnshire, and Yorkshire in the 12th and 13th centuries and may be of Breton origin, according to Reaney. Compare Old Breton Cunmin, which also appears as Cumin, and is from con- ‘hound’ with an uncertain second element, perhaps the min ‘edge’ which is found in other personal names.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cuimín (or Ó Cuimín) ‘son (or ‘descendant’) of Cuimín’, a personal name formed from a diminutive of cam ‘crooked’. There was a 7th-century abbot of Iona named Cumin. In Scotland, this Irish surname became confused with the Norman name.

History: A notable bearer of the Norman surname is Wilhelmus Comyn, Bishop of Durham, who came north to Scotland with King David I in 1124 and was appointed Chancellor of Scotland. He established his nephew Richard in Tynedale and Roxburghshire, and Richard also rose to be Chancellor of Scotland. The Comyn or Cumming family gained the earldoms of Buchan and Menteith and rose to be the most powerful noble family in Scotland in the century before the rise of King Robert Bruce.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Comyn II was born in 1242, in Badenoch, Inverness-shire, Scotland, his father, Sir John I - Ruadh - The Red Comyn Earl of Badenoch - Justiciar of Galloway, was 27 and his mother, Marion Maclachlan Of Galloway, was 16. He married Alianora de Balliol about 1273, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died before 26 May 1302, in Inverness-shire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Comyn II est né en 1242, à Badenoch, Inverness-shire, Écosse, son père, Sir John I - Ruadh - The Red Comyn Earl of Badenoch - Justiciar of Galloway, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Marion Maclachlan Of Galloway, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Alianora de Balliol environ 1273, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé avant 26 mai 1302, à Inverness-shire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Comyn II 1242 in Badenoch, Inverness-shire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John I - Ruadh - The Red Comyn Earl of Badenoch - Justiciar of Galloway 27 und seine Mutter Marion Maclachlan Of Galloway 16. Er hat um 1273 in England Alianora de Balliol geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb vor 26. Mai 1302 in Inverness-shire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Comyn II è nato il nel 1242 nel Badenoch, Inverness-shire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir John I - Ruadh - The Red Comyn Earl of Badenoch - Justiciar of Galloway, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Marion Maclachlan Of Galloway, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Alianora de Balliol circa 1273, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì prima del 26 maggio 1302, nel Inverness-shire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: John Comyn IIが1242年にスコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアバデノチで生まれた時，父Sir John I - Ruadh - The Red Comyn Earl of Badenoch - Justiciar of Gallowayは27歳，母Marion Maclachlan Of Gallowayは16歳であった。約1273年にイギリスでAlianora de Balliolと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1302年5月26日以前にスコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Comyn II(이)가 1242년 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르 바데노치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John I - Ruadh - The Red Comyn Earl of Badenoch - Justiciar of Galloway(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Marion Maclachlan Of Galloway(은)는 16세였다. 그는 대략 1273년 영국에서 Alianora de Balliol(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1302년 5월 26일 이전 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Comyn II nasceu em 1242, em Badenoch, Inverness-shire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir John I - Ruadh - The Red Comyn Earl of Badenoch - Justiciar of Galloway, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Marion Maclachlan Of Galloway, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Alianora de Balliol aproximadamente 1273, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 26 de maio de 1302, em Inverness-shire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Comyn II родился в 1242 г. в местности баденох, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir John I - Ruadh - The Red Comyn Earl of Badenoch - Justiciar of Galloway было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Marion Maclachlan Of Galloway, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Alianora de Balliol около 1273 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он умер перед 26 май 1302 г. в местности инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Comyn II nació en 1242, en Badenoch, Inverness-shire, Scotland, su papá, Sir John I - Ruadh - The Red Comyn Earl of Badenoch - Justiciar of Galloway, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Marion Maclachlan Of Galloway, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Alianora de Balliol aproximadamente 1273, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió antes de 26 de mayo de 1302, en Inverness-shire, Scotland.
